Interview Transparency Notice

VerifySafe Candidate Disclosure — UK GDPR Art. 9 Compliant

This interview uses VerifySafe background verification technology to confirm the identity of both parties on this call. This protects you as a candidate from recruiter impersonation fraud, and protects the agency from synthetic identity fraud.

  • ✓ No recording is stored — processing is local (Edge AI)
  • ✓ Biometric data is not transmitted to third parties
  • ✓ You may decline — the interview will continue without biometric verification
  • ✓ Both recruiter and candidate are verified equally
